entries.title: Foundational Keller collision
entries.scope: A concrete Keller map with the asserted collision and noninjectivity properties.

entries.title: Tangent-map core and weighted suspension
entries.scope: Every polynomial core and admissible weighted seed; inverse pencil, Jacobian/critical divisor, discriminant normalization, Hessian Fitting divisor, incidence normal form, and suspension comparison.

entries.title: Cancellation construction
entries.scope: All cancellation parameters m,r: universal Jacobian, polynomiality criterion, unique parameter-root jet, reconstruction degree, and symbolic collision.

entries.title: Complete canonical boundary exhaustion
entries.scope: The complete codimension-one canonical boundary list for the cancellation construction.

entries.title: Unconditional cancellation thick contact
entries.scope: All m,r thick contacts, with exact scheme intersection and nilpotency index.
supersedes: conditional contact-resultant input for the total contact length

entries.title: Stable normalization functoriality
entries.scope: Polynomial stabilization preserves normalization, boundary primes and (e,f), scheme intersections and nilpotency indices, Fitting ideals, node pairings, and conductors.

entries.title: Cancellation reconstruction residue and parameter faithfulness
entries.scope: The marked reconstruction open; the cancellation reconstruction residue q is invariant and separates parameter roots.

entries.title: Degreewise finite count
entries.scope: Every fixed degree N in the stated cancellation family; finite stable multiplicity from boundary data, thick contact, and parameter-root counting.

entries.title: Decorated-normalization moduli
entries.scope: The coarse decorated normalization has stable-moduli dimension N-3; its generic map has exact degree N-2.

entries.title: Generic affine-mark faithfulness and marked normalization
entries.scope: On the ordinary boundary-clean open, decorated normalization plus one affine root sheet recovers the seed exactly; after shrinking, the seed open normalizes the marked image and forgetting the sheet is finite étale of degree N-2.

entries.title: Hurwitz--LL compactification of rerooting
entries.scope: Internal admissible-cover/Hurwitz--LL compactification theorem; repository proof is complete but externally unreviewed.

entries.title: Formal orbit triviality
entries.scope: Finite-order deformations modulo unrestricted polynomial source automorphisms are formally orbit-trivial.

entries.title: All-degree rank-two residue and symplectic descent
entries.scope: All degrees in the rank-two residue construction, including uniform generic/exceptional charts and symplectic descent.
supersedes: faithfulness as a prerequisite for the principal rank-two dimension theorem

entries.title: Rank-two parameter faithfulness
entries.scope: The ordinary boundary-clean open in every degree; the affine root mark separates the rank-two parameters.

entries.title: Generic nodal-cuspidal discriminant geometry
entries.scope: proved on a nonempty open of normalized admissible degree-n seeds for every n >= 3

entries.title: Canonical-family image and nonproperness
entries.scope: proved for H_d(W)=W^d(1-W) for every d >= 2, including the exact affine image and boundary fibers

entries.title: Omitted-value classification
entries.scope: complete finite classifier for every fixed seed, with a closed classification for primitives having two additional simple zeros

entries.title: Full-contact strata and exceptional components
entries.scope: proved in characteristic zero for every full-contact partition: nonemptiness, dimensions, closure order, maximal components, normalizations, and set-theoretic intersections

entries.title: Contact-atom principle
entries.scope: proved for every normalized exceptional seed locus in characteristic zero; maximal contact types use only multiplicities two and three
supersedes: Mason--Stothers as the source of the two-three classification

entries.title: Exceptional-component normalization
entries.scope: proved for every maximal partition 2^a 3^b in characteristic zero, with an explicit smooth normalization

entries.title: Generic degree-twelve local singularity
entries.scope: proved etale-locally on a dense open of the (6,6) collision stratum; the two branches have transverse intersection length four
supersedes: nodal model for the generic degree-twelve branch intersection

entries.title: Effective finite-field Chebotarev for weighted seeds
entries.scope: proved seed by seed away from an explicit bad ideal, assuming the characteristic-zero seed has S_n monodromy

entries.title: Explicit quartic weighted geometry
entries.scope: Worked quartic tangent-map model and independent regression for W1.
supersedes: bounded quartic seed scan as theorem evidence

entries.title: External quartic-island identification
entries.scope: Audit of the pinned external quartic-map classification against the repository normal form.
supersedes: treating the three quartic islands as unrelated constructions

entries.title: Scheme-theoretic decorated-normalization invariant
entries.scope: The intrinsic finite decorated-normalization cover with its full Fitting and conductor data.

entries.title: Cancellation contact resultant
entries.scope: Every m>=1 for the complete resultant columns r=1,2,3,4.

entries.title: Degree-five decorated-moduli specialization
entries.scope: Worked N=5 specialization on a nonempty open Lambda^o=Lambda intersected with the ordinary boundary-clean locus; exact recovery follows from D1/F2, with the Hessian calculation retained as an independent regression.
supersedes: six-element coarse orbit as the degree-five separation theorem

entries.title: Degree-five rank-two regression
entries.scope: Generated degree-five specialization and independent checker for R1.

entries.title: Filtered A_2 quantization obstruction
entries.scope: The displayed degree-five quantization ansatz has the proved hbar^5 obstruction.

entries.title: Exact symplectic and Weyl lifts
entries.scope: proved for every characteristic-zero Keller map: the polynomial cotangent lift and inverse-Jacobian Weyl embedding preserve fibers and generic degree

entries.title: SU(2) and BCW consequence reproductions
entries.scope: locally proved and exactly replayed: the SU(2) Haar witness, the 3-to-39-to-79 route, and the repository 21-variable essential quotient yielding the route to not GMC(42)
dependencies: external: Bass--Connell--Wright reduction and Long's formulas
supersedes: conditional local reproduction of the SU(2) and BCW routes

entries.title: Fixed-dimensional GMC to SIC to Keller invertibility
entries.scope: proved for every fixed r; applied contrapositively to the 21-variable cubic collision to obtain a locally complete route to not GMC(42)
dependencies: external: Derksen--van den Essen--Zhao and Zhao implication architecture

entries.title: Direct Image and Vanishing counterexamples
entries.scope: proved by explicit identity-slice constructions: not SIC(20), generalized Laplacian/HN failure in 40 variables, homogeneous quartic HN-VC failure in 42 variables, and an all-order inverse recurrence
supersedes: 95-to-190 stable-normal-form dimensions for Image and Vanishing witnesses

entries.title: Constant-term Gaussian--Lagrange identity
entries.scope: proved coefficientwise for polynomial Phi with no restriction on Phi(0), including completed-ring, residue, determinant, and Wick normalization

entries.title: Weighted-seed Gaussian bridge
entries.scope: proved for every nonconstant normalized seed, producing explicit four-real-Gaussian GMC counterexamples and injective mixed-moment fingerprints
supersedes: bounded Wick-moment evidence for the weighted bridge

entries.title: Weighted invariant-coordinate Jacobian reduction
entries.scope: proved for arbitrary weight pattern (1,-1,-k), reducing the three-variable Jacobian to a two-invariant determinant

entries.title: Weighted tangent suspension and Poisson-square reduction
entries.scope: The stated plane-core setup, including the foundational pair, tangent pencil, and weighted-Wronskian cascade.

entries.title: Foundational weighted coefficient scheme
entries.scope: The foundational weighted coefficient scheme is computed in the stated bounded ansatz.

entries.title: Determinant-gauge source contact profile
entries.scope: Exact source-only filtered profile b_m=34m+1 in the determinant-normalized target gauge; this is not target-minimal and is not a stable LR obstruction.
supersedes: unfiltered infinite contact as a moduli invariant

entries.title: Quadratic ladder and rank-two Poisson completion
entries.scope: The quadratic ladder is the m=1 cancellation column, and the stated rank-two Poisson completion is exact.
supersedes: existence gap left by the incomplete rank-two Poisson card

entries.title: Degreewise exact symplectic stable moduli
entries.scope: proved: an (N-3)-dimensional family of pairwise stably inequivalent exact symplectic etale maps of A^6 for every generic degree N >= 4

entries.title: Stable normal-form consequences
entries.scope: proved with corrected stable--Segre terminology: explicit 95-variable cubic and 451-variable Druzkowski reductions, plus valid 190-variable Image and HN witnesses
dependencies: external: Campbell and Gorni--Zampieri stable reductions
supersedes: polynomial-stable label for the Segre step

entries.title: Marked-point dimension barrier
entries.scope: proved for the complete marked-point/hyperplane-complement construction on P^1; affine-space source is possible only in dimension three
supersedes: unqualified extension of the marked-point construction to dimension two

entries.title: Relative-scaling boundary-lattice theorem
entries.scope: proved for two-factor normalization torsors and multi-factor boundary complements, including units, Picard torsion, canonical classes, and the multi-factor unit obstruction
supersedes: separate scaling, unit, and Picard calculations

entries.title: Consecutive-factor contact reduction
entries.scope: A finite motivic classification algorithm for every consecutive row; the quadratic--cubic row is classified and the cubic--quartic row has no affine-space exception.
supersedes: quadratic--cubic row as the only tested consecutive-factor obstruction

entries.title: Normalized quadratic--cubic factorization slice
entries.scope: The normalized factorization slice has the proved smoothness, factoriality, motivic, Chow, K-theoretic, and homotopy invariants.
supersedes: affine-five-space candidate for the tangent quadratic--cubic slice

entries.title: Plane Jacobian degree frontier
entries.scope: locally reproduced conditional on the published minimal/standard normal-form reductions: any plane counterexample has larger coordinate degree at least 125; this does not prove JC(2) or attainability
dependencies: external: published minimal-standard-pair reductions and exact (72,108) certificates

entries.title: Dicritical boundary classification
entries.scope: proved for every admissible primitive in characteristic zero: all dicritical divisors of the normalized inverse graph and their target images are classified

entries.title: Valuative affine-mark extension
entries.scope: Extend the affine root sheet through every collision stratum of the marked admissible-cover compactification, making the full marked map representable and radicial.

entries.title: Higher cancellation contact resultants
entries.scope: Prove the uniform cancellation contact resultant for r>=5.

entries.title: Intrinsic complexity-filtered LR coercivity
entries.scope: Prove intrinsic target coercivity and no escape at the base point; the target torus lowers the first two observed degrees from (35,69) to (25,49), while 24m+1 remains conjectural.

entries.title: Cancellation arithmetic
entries.scope: Irreducibility and Galois-group questions for the cancellation parameter polynomials.

entries.title: Controlled-boundary suspension classification
entries.scope: Classify controlled-boundary suspensions beyond the canonical constructions.

entries.title: Wider quantization lifts
entries.scope: Search beyond the bounded quantization ansatz after the proved hbar^5 obstruction.

entries.title: Coefficient-scheme boundary gluing
entries.scope: Determine the nilpotent boundary gluing of the proved foundational coefficient scheme.

entries.title: Factorization-slice product and flexibility
entries.scope: Decide the global A^2 x SL_2 product and flexibility questions.

entries.title: Poisson-completion provenance
entries.scope: Resolve the provenance of the announced external rank-two Poisson manuscript.

entries.title: Plane-Jacobian degree frontier
entries.scope: Advance the plane-Jacobian degree frontier beyond the reproduced certified ranges.

entries.title: Gaussian and Image/Vanishing consequences
entries.scope: Develop the Gaussian and Image/Vanishing consequence programme beyond the verified formal identities.
